notes: Updates the Dashboard Resources tile so it shows money available to allocate, a balanced state, or a shortfall rather than defaulting to safe weekly spend.
Shows unallocated money as an amount to direct toward emergency, savings, debt, or planned irregular costs.
Treats overcommitted Spending Plans as a shortfall state on the Dashboard and summary strip.
Changes Spending Plan navigation from button-style segmented controls to Streamlit tab-style navigation matching Pathmark Online beta.
release: v0.6.54 Spending Plan money-flow dashboard and tab navigation
release_name: Spending Plan money-flow dashboard and tab navigation
release_notes: Updates the Dashboard Resources tile to show allocatable surplus, balanced flow, or shortfall, and changes Spending Plan navigation to tab-style sections consistent with Pathmark Online beta.
label: Spending Plan money-flow dashboard and tab navigation
